meaning: adv.逶ｸ遲牙慍,蟷ｳ遲牙慍,蜈ｬ蟷ｳ蝨ｰ
examples: Diet and exercise are equally important.
All these techniques are equally effective.
We try to treat every member of staff equally.
By night, when runners cover the isolated Iveragh Peninsula, the views are equally stunning.
Ms. LAURA LINNEY (Actress): (As Joan Berkman) We will be able to see you both equally.
